scripts.build: wxt build --browser chrome --mv3 && wxt build --browser firefox --mv3
scripts.zip:builds: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'releases' -Force | Out-Null; Compress-Archive -Path 'dist/chrome-mv3/*' -DestinationPath 'releases/twitch-improved-chrome-mv3.zip' -Force; Compress-Archive -Path 'dist/firefox-mv3/*' -DestinationPath 'releases/twitch-improved-firefox-mv3.zip' -Force"
